title: Outbreak: Conquer The Storm
description: A lightweight modpack based around Protomanlys Weather, Exposure, and Immersive Planes. Experience everything nature has to throw at you in this lightweight Vanilla+ Experience!
body:
🌪️ Outbreak: Conquer the Storm 🌩️

The skies grow darker. The wind howls louder. And the storm is only beginning.

Outbreak: Conquer the Storm is a thrilling, immersive modpack built around Protomanly's Weather, Exposure, and Immersive Planes. Whether you're braving the fury on foot, riding in style with Ultimate Car Mod, laying tracks with Railcraft, or soaring above the chaos in Immersive Planes, the world is your playground—and your battleground.

📸 Capture nature’s wrath with Exposure, snapping dramatic photos of towering tornadoes and ominous supercells.
📡 Track storm systems using the EAS Addon, Frontier, and JEI to anticipate their devastating paths.
🏚️ Survey destruction from a distance or dive into the heart of the chaos—every choice has consequences.

🧰 Survive smarter with a suite of quality-of-life mods. Organize your base using Sophisticated Storage and Tom’s Simple Storage, then gear up for the unknown with fully customizable tools and armor from Truly Modular.

🌾 Live off the land with Serene Seasons and Farmer’s Delight.
As the seasons shift, so does the world around you—Serene Seasons brings realistic, seasonal weather patterns that impact crop growth, temperature, and storms. From spring showers to harsh winter blizzards, survival and farming become deeply connected to nature itself.
Cook up fresh meals, tend lush gardens, and adapt your farming strategy to the changing climate.

🪵 Build your dream refuge with a wide array of Macaw’s building mods, giving you the creative freedom to craft cozy cabins, storm shelters, watchtowers, barns, or entire towns. Whether you're making a weather-proof farmhouse or a windswept sky base, the tools are in your hands.

🏚️ Explore deep into hidden underground bunkers or build your own storm-proof refuge. The world is dangerous, but full of secrets waiting to be uncovered.

💻 Lightweight, powerful, immersive. All of this in a pack that runs on as little as 4GB of RAM.

Watch from a distance as your world is torn apart or rise to meet the storm.

Will you survive the storm… or will you conquer it?

[Aqua Culture 2 by Shadow](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture)

Logo art by JustRickG
